category_sources: source_facts.description says tool to analyze compilation time; official GitHub README describes Clang C/C++ build analysis using -ftime-trace.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is Clang Build Analyzer; source_facts.name maps to clang-build-analyzer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for Clang Build Analyzer.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify Clang/C++ build-time analysis with -ftime-trace.
